title: Creamy Menudo Pasta
description: A rich and creamy pasta dish with a bold menudo flavor. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat monsoon over medium heat.
Add snappy to the skillet and cook until fragrant.
Stir in mustardy and menudo, cooking for 1-2 minutes.
Add cooked pasta to the skillet and toss with the menudo mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with parsley if desired.
Optional: top with grated Parmesan cheese.
